p.c: function[T0: Semiring](x0: Subsemiring[T0], x1: Subsemiring[T0]) { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[T0]](x0, x1) = subsemiring_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[S](a, b)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(x1, x1) } = is_reflexive[T0](x0) }[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]])
not is_reflexive[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]]) or forall(x0: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x0) } = true
not forall(x0: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x0) } or is_reflexive[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]])
exists(k0: Subsemiring[S]) { not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k0, k0) } or is_reflexive[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]])
let w0: Subsemiring[S] satisfy { not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w0) }

goal: is_transitive[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]]) = forall(x0: Subsemiring[S], x1: Subsemiring[S], x2: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte(x0, x1) and LTE.lte(x1, x2) implies LTE.lte(x0, x2) }

p.c: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) } = is_transitive[T0](x0) }[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]])
not forall(x0: Subsemiring[S], x1: Subsemiring[S], x2: Subsemiring[S]) { not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x1) or not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x1, x2) or LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x2) }
exists(k0: Subsemiring[S], k1: Subsemiring[S], k2: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k0, k1) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k1, k2) and not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k0, k2) }
exists(k0: Subsemiring[S], k1: Subsemiring[S], k2: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k0, k1) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k1, k2) and not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k0, k2) }
let w0: Subsemiring[S] satisfy { exists(k3: Subsemiring[S], k4: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, k3) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k3, k4) and not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, k4) } }
let w1: Subsemiring[S] satisfy { exists(k5: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w1) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w1, k5) and not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, k5) } }
let w2: Subsemiring[S] satisfy { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w1) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w1, w2) and not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w2) }
let w3: Subsemiring[S] satisfy { exists(k8: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w3) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w3, k8) and not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, k8) } }
let w4: Subsemiring[S] satisfy { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w3) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w3, w4) and not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w4) }
let w5: Subsemiring[S] satisfy { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w3) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w3, w5) and not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w5) }
function(x0: Subsemiring[S], x1: Subsemiring[S], x2: Subsemiring[S]) { not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x1) or not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x1, x2) or LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x2) }(w0, w3, w5)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x1) or x2 = x1 } = is_antisymmetric[T0](x0) }[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]])

not is_antisymmetric[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]]) or forall(x0: Subsemiring[S], x1: Subsemiring[S]) { not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x1) or not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x1, x0) or x1 = x0 } = true

(forall(x0: Subsemiring[S]) { not is_antisymmetric[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]]) or forall(x1: Subsemiring[S]) { not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x1) or not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x1, x0) or x0 = x1 } = true })

(forall(x0: Subsemiring[S], x1: Subsemiring[S]) { not (LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x1) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x1, x0) and x0 != x1) or not is_antisymmetric[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]]) })

(forall(x0: Subsemiring[S], x1: Subsemiring[S]) { not (LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x1) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x1, x0)) or not is_antisymmetric[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]]) or x0 = x1 })

(forall(x0: Subsemiring[S], x1: Subsemiring[S]) { not is_antisymmetric[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]]) or not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x1) or not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x1, x0) or x0 = x1 })

not forall(x0: Subsemiring[S], x1: Subsemiring[S]) { not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x1) or not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x1, x0) or x1 = x0 } or is_antisymmetric[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]])
exists(k0: Subsemiring[S], k1: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k0, k1) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k1, k0) and k1 != k0 } or is_antisymmetric[Subsemiring[S]](LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]])
not forall(x0: Subsemiring[S], x1: Subsemiring[S]) { not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x1) or not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x1, x0) or x1 = x0 }
exists(k0: Subsemiring[S], k1: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k0, k1) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k1, k0) and k1 != k0 }
exists(k0: Subsemiring[S], k1: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k0, k1) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k1, k0) and k1 != k0 }
let w0: Subsemiring[S] satisfy { exists(k2: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, k2) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](k2, w0) and k2 != w0 } }
let w1: Subsemiring[S] satisfy { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w1) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w1, w0) and w0 != w1 }
let w2: Subsemiring[S] satisfy { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w2) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w2, w0) and w0 != w2 }
function(x0: Subsemiring[S], x1: Subsemiring[S]) { not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x0, x1) or not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](x1, x0) or x0 = x1 }(w2, w0)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: Subsemiring[T0], x1: Subsemiring[T0]) { Meet.meet[Subsemiring[T0]](x0, x1) = x0 ∩ x1 }[S](a, b)

goal: forall(x0: Subsemiring[S], x1: Subsemiring[S], x2: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte(x0, x1) and LTE.lte(x0, x2) implies LTE.lte(x0, Meet.meet(x1)(x2)) }

let w1: Subsemiring[S] satisfy { exists(k5: Subsemiring[S]) { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w1) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, k5) and not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, Meet.meet[Subsemiring[S]](w1, k5)) } }

let w4: Subsemiring[S] satisfy { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w3) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w4) and not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, Meet.meet[Subsemiring[S]](w3, w4)) }
let w5: Subsemiring[S] satisfy { LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w3) and LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, w5) and not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[S]](w0, Meet.meet[Subsemiring[S]](w3, w5)) }

function[T0: Semiring](x0: Subsemiring[T0], x1: Subsemiring[T0], x2: Subsemiring[T0]) { not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[T0]](x0, x1) or not LTE.lte[Subsemiring[T0]](x0, x2) or LTE.lte[Subsemiring[T0]](x0, Meet.meet[Subsemiring[T0]](x1, x2)) }[S](w0, w3, w5)
